canonical_question: Was the policy implemented as intended
methods: Implementation fidelity assessment, document review, interviews

canonical_question: Did the policy reach the intended population
methods: Administrative data analysis, monitoring data review

canonical_question: To what extent did delivery match the design
How was the policy adapted in practice
In what contexts did the policy work better or worse
What change in outcomes was caused by the policy

methods: RCT or QED with effect size and confidence interval
Subgroup analysis, interaction terms, machine learning

canonical_question: How long did the effect last

methods: Mixed methods, theory-based evaluation, qualitative scoping

canonical_question: What was the cost per unit of outcome
Did benefits outweigh costs in monetary terms
What is the benefit cost ratio
How were costs and benefits distributed across groups
Can the policy be sustained at scale
methods: Fiscal sustainability analysis, opportunity cost review

canonical_question: Were inputs procured at lowest reasonable cost
Were outputs produced from inputs at the right rate
Did outputs translate into intended outcomes
